requirement_topic.en: Radio Site Clearance — SACFA / WPC for fixed wireless installations
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电站址批准 — 固定无线安装的SACFA / WPC批准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電站址批准 — 固定無線安裝的SACFA / WPC批准

summary.en: Where a wireless/IoT deployment involves fixed radio installations, outdoor antennas, base stations, backhaul links, satellite links, or other network radio sites, India may require Standing Advisory Committee on Radio Frequency Allocation (SACFA) clearance and related WPC permissions. SACFA clearance is separate from ordinary product ETA: ETA addresses equipment type, while SACFA addresses site, antenna, frequency, height, and interference/safety coordination. The legal gate comes from India's radio licensing and telecom framework, including the Indian Wireless Telegraphy Act, 1933 and applicable DoT/WPC procedures. Technical standards may support engineering evidence as voluntary presumption tools; legal obligations come from Indian law, notification, or licence condition.
summary.zh: 如果无线/物联网部署涉及固定无线电装置、室外天线、基站、回传链路、卫星链路或其他网络无线电站点，印度可能要求取得无线电频率分配常设咨询委员会（SACFA）批准及相关WPC许可。SACFA批准不同于普通产品ETA：ETA关注设备型号，SACFA关注站址、天线、频率、高度及干扰/安全协调。强制法律门槛来自印度无线电许可和电信框架，包括《1933年印度无线电报法》及适用的DoT/WPC程序。技术标准可作为自愿推定工程证据；法律义务来自印度法律、通知或许可条件。
summary.zht: 如果無線/物聯網部署涉及固定無線電裝置、室外天線、基站、回傳鏈路、衛星鏈路或其他網路無線電站點，印度可能要求取得無線電頻率分配常設諮詢委員會（SACFA）批准及相關WPC許可。SACFA批准不同於普通產品ETA：ETA關注設備型號，SACFA關注站址、天線、頻率、高度及干擾/安全協調。強制法律門檻來自印度無線電許可和電信框架，包括《1933年印度無線電報法》及適用的DoT/WPC程序。技術標準可作為自願推定工程證據；法律義務來自印度法律、通知或許可條件。

standards_or_laws: Indian Wireless Telegraphy Act, 1933 — mandatory radio licensing/control framework
DoT/WPC SACFA clearance process — mandatory where applicable for radio sites and installations
Applicable antenna, EMF, and interference engineering standards — voluntary presumption evidence

summary.en: China regulates radio stations and transmitters under the Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China and MIIT/NRA procedures. A product may have SRRC Type Approval, and a network deployment may still need station, frequency, or operator permissions depending on use. Chinese station or radio permissions do not clear an Indian site and do not replace SACFA/WPC review.
summary.zh: 中国依据《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》及工信部/国家无线电管理局程序管理无线电台站和发射设备。产品可能已取得SRRC型号核准，但网络部署仍可能因用途需要台站、频率或运营许可。中国台站或无线电许可不能批准印度站址，也不能替代SACFA/WPC审查。
summary.zht: 中國依據《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》及工信部/國家無線電管理局程序管理無線電台站和發射設備。產品可能已取得SRRC型號核准，但網路部署仍可能因用途需要台站、頻率或營運許可。中國台站或無線電許可不能批准印度站址，也不能取代SACFA/WPC審查。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China — mandatory radio administration framework
SRRC Type Approval and station/frequency permissions where applicable — mandatory China controls

gap.en: For India, distinguish portable end-user devices from infrastructure or fixed-site deployments. A China-origin gateway with only Bluetooth/Wi-Fi may need WPC ETA, while an outdoor access point, private wireless link, cellular IoT base station, or satellite terminal may also trigger SACFA/WPC site or frequency approvals. Chinese SRRC evidence is useful only as background technical documentation and cannot replace Indian site clearance.
gap.zh: 进入印度时，应区分便携终端设备与基础设施或固定站址部署。仅带蓝牙/Wi-Fi的中国网关可能需要WPC ETA，而室外接入点、专用无线链路、蜂窝物联网基站或卫星终端还可能触发SACFA/WPC站址或频率批准。中国SRRC证据只能作为背景技术文件，不能替代印度站址批准。
gap.zht: 進入印度時，應區分便攜終端設備與基礎設施或固定站址部署。僅帶藍牙/Wi-Fi的中國閘道器可能需要WPC ETA，而室外接入點、專用無線鏈路、蜂窩物聯網基站或衛星終端還可能觸發SACFA/WPC站址或頻率批准。中國SRRC證據只能作為背景技術文件，不能取代印度站址批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — SACFA/WPC clearance required for covered radio sites and installations; engineering standards are voluntary presumption evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where applicable — China station, frequency, and SRRC controls apply under domestic radio regulations

source.publisher: Department of Telecommunications, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SACFA/WPC is a deployment and site-clearance issue, not just a product certificate. Infrastructure-grade wireless/IoT projects should screen for SACFA before shipment, installation, or activation in India.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】SACFA/WPC属于部署和站址批准问题，不只是产品证书。基础设施类无线/物联网项目在出货、安装或启用前应筛查是否需要SACFA。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】SACFA/WPC屬於部署和站址批准問題，不只是產品證書。基礎設施類無線/物聯網項目在出貨、安裝或啟用前應篩查是否需要SACFA。
